# Responsibility brainstorming

# River City Girls

[River City Girls](../../../../Inspirations/Inspirations/River%20City%20Girls%2022a58e628ba280688bb9eae58590609a.md) leans heavily into its beat-em-up trope.

> Kyoko: You ever wonder why everyone in our town is so violent?
Misako: Nope.
Kyoko: I mean, everyone’s always punching and kicking each other. Like, everywhere we go, all day long.
Misako: I guess so.  What’s your point?
Kyoko: Nothing.
> 

Is it possible to responsibly treat a genre trope as a surreal norm?

# Audience effect

The main issue is how the situation effects the audience.
